column_description: Shooting hand (or catching hand for goalies)
value_description:
commonsense evidence: 
Shooting hand (or catching hand for goalies)
L: left hand
R: right hand
if null or 'empty', it means this player is good at both left and right hand

column_description: ID at the Internet Hockey Database

value_description:
commonsense evidence:
LW: left winger
RW: right winger
C: center
G: goalie
D: defenseman
W: winger
F: forward
the player with W (winger) means he can play the role as both LW (left winger) and RW (right winger)
some players have two positions, which will be shown as "L/D". It means that LW + D --> left winger and defenseman
